name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange PowerShell Snap-Ins Usage
notes:
This building block detects adding and using Exchange PowerShell snap-ins to export mailbox data.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: FPT.EagleEye, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Exchange PowerShell Snap-Ins Usage
SIGMA Description: Detects adding and using Exchange PowerShell snap-ins to export mailbox data. As seen used by HAFNIUM and APT27

Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange PowerShell Snap-Ins Usage on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of Add-PSSnapin
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [Microsoft.Exchange.Powershell.Snapin or Microsoft.Exchange.Management.PowerShell.SnapIn]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange PowerShell Snap-Ins Usage on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of Add-PSSnapin
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [Microsoft.Exchange.Powershell.Snapin or Microsoft.Exchange.Management.PowerShell.SnapIn]
